faq.label: FAQ
notFound.title: Page not found. The link may be broken or the page was moved.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions about our services and process.
faq.a1: We offer custom web development, AI automation, UI/UX design, and digital marketing. From full e-commerce platforms to landing pages and ongoing marketing campaigns, we cover the full digital lifecycle.
faq.q2: How long does a typical project take?
faq.a2: Timelines vary by scope. A landing page might take 2–4 weeks, while a full web application can take 2–4 months. We provide a detailed timeline and milestones during the discovery phase.
faq.a3: We offer fixed-scope project pricing and retainer plans. After discussing your goals, we provide a transparent quote. Our Starter, Pro, and Enterprise plans are designed to scale with your needs.
faq.a4: Yes. All plans include post-launch support. We offer maintenance, updates, and optional retainer hours for continuous improvements and new features.
faq.a5: We use modern, proven stacks: React, Node.js, TypeScript, and cloud infrastructure. We choose the best tools for your project's performance, security, and maintainability.
faq.q6: Can you work with our existing design or brand?
faq.a6: Absolutely. We can implement your existing brand and designs or create new ones. We'll align with your guidelines and ensure a consistent experience across all deliverables.
faq.q7: What is your typical project process?
faq.a7: Every project follows our proven four-phase approach: Discovery & Strategy, Design & Prototyping, Development & Testing, and Launch & Support. We keep you involved at every milestone with regular updates, review sessions, and transparent communication throughout.
faq.q8: Do you work with international clients?
faq.a8: Absolutely. We work with clients worldwide and have experience managing projects across different time zones. Our tools and workflows are designed for seamless remote collaboration, and we offer multilingual support in English, Spanish, French, and German.
faq.q9: How many clients do you handle at once?
faq.a9: We intentionally limit our active projects to ensure every client receives dedicated attention and top-quality results. Typically we manage 4–6 concurrent projects, each with a dedicated team lead who serves as your single point of contact.

product.websites.heroSubtitle: A dedicated website built for your brand — responsive, fast, and ready to grow.
product.websites.whatIs: A custom website is your business's home online. We design and develop it from scratch: structure, design, content, and deployment. From a simple multi-page site to a more complex web app, everything is tailored to your goals and brand.
product.websites.forWhom1: Businesses that need a professional presence online
product.websites.forWhom2: Startups and SMBs that want a unique site, not a template
product.websites.forWhom3: Anyone who wants a fast, mobile-friendly site that converts
product.websites.includes1: Custom design aligned with your brand
product.websites.includes3: Fast hosting setup and basic SEO
product.websites.includes4: Handover and short training for updates
product.landing.heroSubtitle: A single, focused page that turns visitors into leads or customers.
product.landing.whatIs: A landing page is one long page with one clear goal: sign-ups, contact, or sales. No distractions — just a strong headline, benefits, and a call-to-action. We build it for campaigns, product launches, or events.
product.landing.forWhom1: Ad campaigns (Google, Meta) that need a dedicated page
product.landing.includes3: Form or CTA linked to your CRM or email
product.card.heroSubtitle: A smart, shareable card with your details — by link or QR — that works on any device.
product.card.whatIs: A digital business card is a small, dedicated page with your photo, name, title, contact details, and links. Share it via link or QR code. No app required; it opens in any browser. Ideal for networking, events, and keeping your details always up to date.
product.card.forWhom1: Professionals and freelancers who network often
product.card.forWhom2: Sales and bizdev teams who want a unified presence
product.card.forWhom3: Anyone who wants to ditch paper cards and look modern
product.card.includes2: Your details: phone, email, social, website
product.card.includes4: Works on every device, no app needed
product.marketing.heroSubtitle: Data-driven campaigns on Meta, Google, and more — from setup to optimization.
product.marketing.whatIs: We plan, create, and manage your paid campaigns on Meta (Facebook & Instagram), Google, LinkedIn, and TikTok. Targeting, creatives, landing pages, and tracking — so you get leads and sales without managing everything yourself.
product.marketing.forWhom1: Businesses that want more leads or sales from ads
product.marketing.forWhom2: Brands that need professional creatives and targeting
product.marketing.forWhom3: Anyone who wants ROI-focused campaigns without an in-house team

services.web.title: Web Development
services.web.desc: Custom websites and web applications built with modern technologies. From blazing-fast landing pages to complex SaaS platforms.
services.web.long: Our expert developers build high-performance web applications using React, Next.js, and Node.js. We create scalable, secure, and lightning-fast digital experiences that drive real business results. From e-commerce platforms to enterprise dashboards, we handle it all.
services.ai.title: AI Automation
services.ai.desc: Leverage artificial intelligence to automate workflows, enhance customer experiences, and unlock data-driven insights for your business.
services.ai.long: Harness the power of machine learning and AI to transform your business operations. We build intelligent chatbots, predictive analytics systems, automated content generation tools, and custom AI solutions that save time and increase revenue.
services.design.title: UI/UX Design
services.design.desc: Beautiful, intuitive interfaces that delight users and drive conversions. We combine aesthetics with user research for impactful design.
services.design.long: Our design team creates pixel-perfect interfaces grounded in user research and best practices. We conduct usability testing, create wireframes and prototypes, and deliver design systems that ensure consistency across your entire product ecosystem.
services.marketing.title: Digital Marketing
services.marketing.desc: Strategic campaigns that amplify your online presence. SEO, social media, PPC, and content marketing tailored to your goals.
services.marketing.long: We develop data-driven marketing strategies that deliver measurable ROI. Our team handles everything from SEO and content marketing to paid advertising and social media management, helping your brand reach the right audience at the right time.

about.label: Who We Are
about.title: About WebStudio
about.subtitle: A team of passionate technologists and creative minds building the future of digital experiences.
about.story.title: Our Story
about.story.p1: Founded in 2019, WebStudio began with a simple mission: to bridge the gap between cutting-edge technology and meaningful business outcomes. What started as a small team of three developers has grown into a full-service digital agency with over 30 talented professionals.
about.story.p2: We believe that great technology should be accessible to every business, regardless of size. Our approach combines deep technical expertise with a genuine understanding of our clients' challenges, enabling us to deliver solutions that truly make a difference.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.text: To empower businesses with innovative digital solutions that drive growth, efficiency, and lasting competitive advantage in an ever-evolving technological landscape.
about.values.title: Our Values
about.values.v1.title: Innovation First
about.values.v1.desc: We constantly push boundaries and explore emerging technologies to deliver forward-thinking solutions.
about.values.v2.title: Client Partnership
about.values.v2.desc: We treat every client relationship as a long-term partnership, investing in your success as our own.
about.values.v3.title: Quality Obsession
about.values.v3.desc: Every line of code, every pixel, and every strategy is crafted with meticulous attention to detail.
about.values.v4.title: Transparency
about.values.v4.desc: Open communication and honest feedback form the foundation of how we work with our clients and each other.

privacy.label: Legal
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information.
privacy.section1.title: Information We Collect
privacy.section1.content: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, and project details when you fill out our contact form, register an account, or communicate with us. We may also collect technical data such as IP address, browser type, and usage patterns to improve our services.
privacy.section2.title: How We Use Your Information
privacy.section2.content: We use your information to provide and improve our services, respond to your inquiries, send project updates and communications, process transactions, and personalize your experience. We may also use your data for analytics and to comply with legal obligations.
privacy.section3.title: Data Protection
privacy.section3.content: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, secure servers, and access controls to protect your personal data. We regularly review and update our security practices to ensure your information remains safe.
privacy.section4.title: Cookies
privacy.section4.content: Our website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience, remember your preferences, and analyze site traffic. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings. Essential cookies are required for the website to function properly.
privacy.section5.title: Third-Party Services
privacy.section5.content: We may share information with trusted third-party service providers who assist us in operating our website, conducting our business, or serving you. These parties are contractually obligated to keep your information confidential and secure.
privacy.section6.title: Children's Privacy
privacy.section6.content: Our services are not intended for children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have collected information from a child, please contact us immediately.
privacy.section7.title: Changes to This Policy
privacy.section7.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the 'last updated' date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
privacy.section8.title: Contact Us
privacy.section8.content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or our data practices, please contact us at support@webstudio-ias.com. We are committed to resolving any concerns about your privacy.
privacy.contact.title: Questions About Your Privacy?
privacy.contact.description: Our team is here to help with any privacy-related concerns or requests.
refund.label: Legal
refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.subtitle: We want you to be completely satisfied with our services. Please review our refund guidelines below.
refund.section1.title: Overview
refund.section1.content: At WebStudio, we strive to deliver high-quality digital solutions that meet your expectations. We understand that sometimes things don't work out as planned, and we have established this refund policy to ensure fairness for all parties.
refund.section2.title: Eligibility for Refund
refund.section2.content: Refund requests may be considered if submitted within 14 days of the initial payment, if the project has not yet entered the development phase, or if we fail to deliver the agreed-upon services. Each request is evaluated on a case-by-case basis.
refund.section3.title: Refund Process
refund.section3.content: To request a refund, please contact our support team at support@webstudio-ias.com with your project details and reason for the request. Our team will review your request within 3-5 business days and respond with a resolution.
refund.section4.title: Refund Timeframe
refund.section4.content: Approved refunds will be processed within 7-10 business days. Refunds will be issued to the original payment method. You will receive a confirmation email once the refund has been processed.
refund.section5.title: Non-Refundable Items
refund.section5.content: The following are generally non-refundable: completed and delivered projects that meet the agreed specifications, custom domain purchases, third-party software licenses purchased on your behalf, and work completed beyond the initial project scope.
refund.section6.title: Cancellation Policy
refund.section6.content: You may cancel your project at any time by notifying us in writing. If cancellation occurs after work has begun, charges may apply for work already completed. We will provide a detailed breakdown of any charges upon cancellation.
refund.section7.title: Contact Us
refund.section7.content: For any questions regarding refunds or to submit a refund request, please reach out to our support team at support@webstudio-ias.com. We aim to resolve all inquiries promptly and fairly.
refund.contact.title: Need to Request a Refund?
refund.contact.description: Contact our support team and we'll work with you to find a fair resolution.
